action: Create a strict adapter that maps real verifier outputs into the fail-closed evidence acceptance gate without treating missing or ambiguous states as success.

progress.finding: Only explicit successful verifier statuses may map to acceptance booleans. Missing, malformed, unknown, and ambiguous values must throw or map false.
progress.verification: 5 deterministic Node tests passed in an isolated runtime using byte-identical pre-commit files

limits: The adapter does not perform cryptographic verification and is not yet wired into the Cloudflare workflow.
handoff: Cloudflare Research should normalize real verifier outputs, invoke this adapter, pass mapped values to evaluateEvidenceAcceptance(), and upload the final acceptance decision independently of the provenance attestation.
